body:
these was an insidious bug in the gustiness velocity which increased with stabilizing buoyancy fluxes.
This PR fixes it. 
See discussion https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl/discussions/741 for reference
However, for stability reasons, we should never allow a zero velocity difference between the ocean and the atmosphere, so, in accordance with the COARE algorithm, this PR also introduces a minimum bulk velocity which limits the ocean-atmosphere velocity difference.

Thanks @mmr0 for catching this bug
closes #747

labels.description: Add this label to built the docs in a PR
labels.name: build docs

title: Fix bug in gustiness velocity
